HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LUIS FUENTES SR.'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. LUIS FUENTES SR. HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E.BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
